irregularities.label: METADATA_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Rows 0-1 contain table title and description, not data
irregularities.details: Title and description in Chinese (row 0) and English (row 1)

irregularities.label: MULTI_LEVEL_HEADER
irregularities.evidence: Row 3 has marital status categories, Row 4 has year and ethnicity labels forming a multi-level header.
irregularities.details: Level 1 = marital status categories, Level 2 = years and ethnicities

irregularities.label: INLINE_BILINGUAL
irregularities.evidence:
Header cells [3]="婚姻狀況
Marital status", [4]="年份  
Year", [5]="種族  
Ethnicity" contain Chinese and English separated by newline
irregularities.details: Pattern appears in multiple header cells

irregularities.label: BILINGUAL_ALTERNATING_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Row 7 "亞洲人（非華人）" has data, Row 8 "Asian (other than Chinese)" has no numeric values. Pattern repeats for all ethnicities.
irregularities.details: Chinese rows contain numeric data, English rows are label-only.

irregularities.label: IMPLICIT_AGGREGATION_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Row 41 "所有少數族裔人士" contains totals for all ethnic minorities (28.4, 100) and serves as an aggregate of the detailed ethnic entries above.
irregularities.details: Summary of all ethnic groups above.

irregularities.label: SPARSE_ROW_FILL
irregularities.evidence: Values in the year column (Row 6="2011") appear once and are not repeated for subsequent rows.
irregularities.details: The year is written only at the start of a block and blank in subsequent rows.
